items.label: The Will (2D RTS)
items.description: Our flagship 2D Action Real-Time Strategy game focusing on dynamic global battle management and deep tactical combat control.
requirements: Basic understanding of Unity Engine and C# aspects
tasks: Unificate multiplayer and singleplayer core logic implementations.

items.label: The Smuggle (Tycoon)
items.description: A simple economic and hide-and-seek simulation game where players build their trading empires by managing their resources and controlling secretive .
requirements: Basic understanding of Unity Engine and C# aspects

items.label: Memory Bucket (C++ Framework)
items.description: An open-source, high-performance C++ memory management framework designed to eliminate allocation bottlenecks in demanding applications.

items.label: C++ General Developer
items.description: A versatile core engineer responsible for building robust backend systems, high-performance algorithms, and engine integrations.
requirements: Understanding of OOP and Data Structures

items.label: C++ Embedded Developer
items.description: A specialist focused on low-level hardware interactions, writing code that runs closer to the metal for maximum efficiency.

items.label: C++ Qt Developer
items.description: A UI/UX engineering role focused on building responsive, cross-platform desktop tools and applications using the Qt framework.

items.label: C++ Boost Developer
items.description: An algorithmic specialist heavily utilizing the Boost libraries to solve complex mathematical, networking, or structural problems.

items.label: C++ AI Developer
items.description: A low-level AI engineer focused on translating theoretical Neural Networks and Machine Learning models into highly optimized C++ code.

items.label: Unity General Developer
items.description: A core gameplay programmer responsible for bringing game designs to life using Unity and C#.

items.label: Unity Multiplayer Developer
items.description: A networking specialist using frameworks like Mirror to synchronize complex game states across multiple clients.

items.label: Unity Visuals (VFX/Shaders)
items.description: A technical artist role focused on making our projects look stunning using Unity's Shader Graph, VFX Graph, and rendering pipelines.

items.label: Unity AI Trainer
items.description: A specialist using tools like Unity ML-Agents to train intelligent, unpredictable, and challenging NPCs.

items.label: Python AI Developer
items.description: A data and modeling specialist focused on designing, training, and testing complex Neural Networks before they are deployed to production.

items.label: 2D Artist
items.description: A creative visionary responsible for the visual identity, concept art, and final in-game 2D assets of our projects.

items.label: Sound Designer (SFX)
items.description: An audio engineer dedicated to creating immersive soundscapes, impactful feedback noises, and satisfying ambient effects.

items.label: Musician
items.description: A composer responsible for writing memorable, emotional, and dynamic soundtracks that elevate the player's experience.
